zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Bamville於1185年出生在英國爾斯托雷頓時，她的父親Alexander de Bamville50歲，母親Rose de Stourton40歲。她於1220年與Philip de Orreby I在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1240年在英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia de Bamville于1185年出生在英国爾斯托雷頓时，她的父亲Alexander de Bamville50岁，母亲Rose de Stourton40岁。她于1220年与Philip de Orreby I在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1240年在英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bamville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Alban, Andre, Armand, Benoit.
French and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, France, recorded in the 13th century as Badanvilla ‘estate of a woman called Bada’. Compare Banfield .

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

variants.name: Banwell
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name from Banwell in Somerset, named from Old English bana ‘killer’ + wella ‘stream, spring’.
English: habitational name from Banwell Farm in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Banville   or   Banfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Bamville was born in 1185, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, her father, Alexander de Bamville, was 50 and her mother, Rose de Stourton, was 40. She married Philip de Orreby I in 1220, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1240, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

Elle a épousé Philip de Orreby I en 1220, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1240, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia de Bamvilleが1185年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父Alexander de Bamvilleは50歳，母Rose de Stourtonは40歳であった。1220年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでPhilip de Orreby Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1240年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Bamville(이)가 1185년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander de Bamville(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose de Stourton(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 Philip de Orreby I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스토레턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Orreby I в 1220 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1240 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
